name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m14163 White】This Victorine wallet from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is small and exquisite. The colorful Monogram pattern reinterprets the classic motif with the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas with exquisite calfskin lining and silver hardware, and features a zip coin pocket, with multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
